name: taskcompleted-no-receipt
doc: Verification-receipt gate at TaskCompleted (task-completed.ts:40-48 receiptGate). A PostToolUse Write records the modified code file into the per-session state (track-changes.ts:34-41, under homedir()). On TaskCompleted, code files changed + NO fresh passing tsc/test receipt → the documented refusal `{continue:false, stopReason:"VERIFICATION RECEIPT REQUIRED..."}` (TaskCompleted does NOT honor decision:block, task-completed.ts:36-47). Requires HOME+cwd stable across the two spawns so both the session-state (modifiedFiles) and the track (receipts) line up. Unit parity: test/task-completed.test.ts:27-36.

steps.doc: PostToolUse Write of a code file → trackSessionChanges appends src/ok.ts to modifiedFiles and emits the SNIPER reminder (proving the record happened). postEditContext core path, lifecycle-bridge.ts:53.

TaskCompleted with a tracked code file but no receipt → continue:false. src/ok.ts does not exist on disk, so collectViolations skips it (existsSync guard, task-completed.ts:60) — no false SOLID violation — and the receipt gate fires (codeFiles filters by extension only, task-completed.ts:27-28).
Same TaskCompleted again (idempotent read) — assert the stopReason wording. task-completed.ts:44-47.
